title: Polygone Riviera Shopping Center | Mas du Chanoine
description: Polygone Riviera Shopping Center: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.
paragraphs: Only 2 kilometers from our guesthouse, Polygone Riviera is an attractive outdoor shopping center with pedestrian streets, shops, cinemas and restaurants grouped into 4 themed districts. Nearly 150 stores including Printemps department store invite you to stroll and window shop, and works of art including the famous Sacha Sosno sculpture are on display.
